name: pusher-studio-system
description: Repo-specific workflow guidance for maintaining the Pusher Studio internal management system.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain the Pusher Studio internal system with its local rules.
interface.longDescription: Adds repo-specific guidance for the Pusher Studio internal HTML/Firebase management system, including QR inventory constraints, mobile field workflow, validation, and GitHub handoff habits.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me maintain the Pusher Studio internal management system.
